target: 36. Don't Be Fooled by the Shadow
That one was tough...
How were Asako and Tatsuo?
Normal. One hit with the hammer did it.
"If you deal the equivalent of a fatal wound to a human to its 2D plane, the Shadow will die"...
Either my sister's hypothesis is wrong... Or Shiori was exceptionally tough... We lack sufficient samples...
It said some weird things, too. Something about going home with its family...
A copy... Acting just like a real human...
Shiori said she was "reborn"...
"What is the difference between a perfect copy and the original"... That was the theme of "<color=#GF_TIPS_099>Swampman</color>," wasn't it, Ryunosuke-san...!!
Huh?!
He did mention the "split personality" part... Hizuru said it was fine.
Is that so? Then, it's nice to meet you!
I am Ryunosuke Nagumo. The person who used to be Hizuru Minakata's younger brother.
Um... just to confirm, you're the one writing the novels, Ryunosuke-san...?
Ah, no, no!! My sister is the one writing them.
We're twins, but I have no literary talent. My sister just used my name as part of her pen name.
I only come out to the "front" to handle the socializing my sister hates...
Like when she has to do interviews or go to meetings...
That's why I also go by "Ryunosuke Nagumo." For a long time now...
Still, Shinpei-san, you've read my sister's books before, haven't you.
Well, actually...
He's a nerd! A Nagumo nerd!!
Is that right?
That wasn't on the recorder. She was probably just trying to hide her embarrassment.
If you say anything unnecessary, Hizuru will get mad.
Haha, true. Well then, I'll leave it to my sister from here.
Don't get the wrong idea.
Huh…?
I wasn't embarrassed, and therefore I wasn't hiding anything!
I just... cut out the things that didn't need to be said!!
Nagumo... sensei...?
(S-So when she unties her hair, she reverts to Hizuru-san's personality...)
Returning to the "Swampman" topic from earlier... Do not let the Shadows' appearances and words sway your heart, Shinpei Ajiro.
From now on, even if they appear in the form of your friends or family... or someone you love, you must not hesitate.
We don't have time... You can philosophize about the identity of copies and originals after everything is over.
We were too late for the Kobayakawa family... but. You can still make it in time.
Can you really... kill Mio?
We'll be waiting outside until it's time...
Understood.
Ah, right... Let's exchange contact info. If even the slightest thing happens differently from before, tell me.
Spend your time as close to your previous loops as possible, and assess the situation.
You are the "Observer".
…Yes!!
(Spend my time as close to the previous loops as possible...)
(The situation with the Kobayakawa family, my left arm that got injured when I held down Shiori-chan's Shadow... so many things are already different...)
